message.content:
Update all `bufferedRollbar` / `buffer` method calls in the unit test file `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/unit-tests/rollbar-buffer.config.unit-spec.ts`.

Read the file first. The API has changed — all public methods now take a single object param:
- `buffer.error(err)` → `buffer.error({ err })`
- `buffer.error(err, context)` → `buffer.error({ err, context })`
- `buffer.warning(err)` → `buffer.warning({ err })`
- `buffer.warning(err, context)` → `buffer.warning({ err, context })`
- `buffer.info(msg)` → `buffer.info({ msg })`
- `buffer.info(msg, context)` → `buffer.info({ msg, context })`
- `buffer.critical(err)` → `buffer.critical({ err })`
- `buffer.critical(err, context)` → `buffer.critical({ err, context })`

Update every occurrence. Use Edit tool only (no bash/python/node).

content.text: I'll read the file first to understand all the occurrences that need to be updated.

content.text: Now let me do a final read to verify the file looks correct end-to-end.

All occurrences have been updated correctly. Here is a summary of every change made to `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service/src/unit-tests/rollbar-buffer.config.unit-spec.ts`:

**`buffer.error` calls (positional → object param):**
- Line 33: `buffer.error(new Error('test error'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('test error') })`
- Lines 57–59: three `buffer.error(error)` calls → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Lines 66–68: three more `buffer.error(error)` calls → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Line 82: `buffer.error(error)` → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Lines 94–95: `buffer.error(new Error('error one/two'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('error one/two') })`
- Lines 108: `buffer.error('same message')` → `buffer.error({ err: 'same message' })`
- Lines 118–119, 123: `buffer.error(error)` → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Lines 137–138, 142: `buffer.error(error)` → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Line 159: `buffer.error(error, { requestId: 'abc' })` → `buffer.error({ err: error, context: { requestId: 'abc' } })`
- Line 163: `buffer.error(error)` → `buffer.error({ err: error })`
- Line 194: `buffer.error(new Error('error one'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('error one') })`
- Line 206: `buffer.error(new Error('error'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('error') })`
- Line 213: `buffer.error(new Error('test'), { extra: 'data' })` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('test'), context: { extra: 'data' } })`
- Line 239: `buffer.error(new Error('auto flush'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('auto flush') })`
- Line 250: `buffer.error(new Error('shutdown error'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('shutdown error') })`
- Line 262: `buffer.error(new Error('after shutdown'))` → `buffer.error({ err: new Error('after shutdown') })`
- Lines 273–274: `buffer.error(error, { requestId: '...' })` → `buffer.error({ err: error, context: { requestId: '...' } })`

**`buffer.warning` calls:**
- Line 40: `buffer.warning('test warning')` → `buffer.warning({ err: 'test warning' })`
- Lines 101–102: `buffer.warning('...')` → `buffer.warning({ err: '...' })`
- Line 109: `buffer.warning('same message')` → `buffer.warning({ err: 'same message' })`
- Line 195: `buffer.warning('warning one')` → `buffer.warning({ err: 'warning one' })`

**`buffer.info` calls:**
- Line 47: `buffer.info('test info')` → `buffer.info({ msg: 'test info' })`
- Line 196: `buffer.info('info one')` → `buffer.info({ msg: 'info one' })`
- Line 229: `buffer.info('string message', { key: 'val' })` → `buffer.info({ msg: 'string message', context: { key: 'val' } })`

**`buffer.critical` calls:**
- Line 176: `buffer.critical(error)` → `buffer.critical({ err: error })`
- Line 186: `buffer.critical(error, context)` → `buffer.critical({ err: error, context })`
